What We Do

Everything Your CarNeeds

From a single budget tyre to a full mechanical overhaul — we do it all under one roof in the centre of Reading. Our team works fast, charges fairly, and never pushes work you don't need.

Budget & Part Worn Tyres

Hundreds of tyres in stock across all sizes. New budget tyres and quality part worns from Continental, Michelin and Pirelli. You will not beat our prices anywhere in Reading.

Wheel Balancing & Alignment

Vibration through the steering wheel? Pulling to one side? Our computerised balancing and alignment equipment gets your wheels set perfectly, extending tyre life and improving safety.

Diagnostics & Servicing

Warning light on? We diagnose it fast with professional equipment. We also offer interim and full services to keep your vehicle roadworthy and your manufacturer warranty intact.

Mechanical Repairs

Brake discs, brake pads, ball joints, exhausts and more. Our mechanics handle a wide range of repairs using quality parts. Honest quotes before we start — no surprises on collection.

Our Promise

Unbeatable Prices.Guaranteed.

We say it plainly: you will not find cheaper tyres anywhere else in Reading. Whether you need budget new tyres or quality part worns from the biggest names in the industry, we have them at prices that no other local garage or national chain can match.

We stock Continental, Michelin and Pirelli part worns alongside a comprehensive range of budget new tyres covering all standard sizes for passenger cars, SUVs and vans. Every tyre we sell is inspected, fitted and balanced on-site by our experienced team.

Our buying power means we pass savings directly to our customers. No hidden fitting fees, no unnecessary upsells. Just quality rubber at the right price.

About Chatham Street Motors

A Reading Garage Built onTrust & Fair Pricing

We are not a franchise. We are not a national chain. We are a local garage on Chatham Street, Reading, run by people who genuinely care about keeping every customer's car safe and every customer's wallet intact.

Our Story

Local People.Local Prices.

Chatham Street Motors was built from the ground up on Chatham Street, right in the heart of Reading, Berkshire. From day one our philosophy has been simple: every driver deserves a safe, reliable vehicle and no one should be priced out of getting it maintained properly.

We specialise in tyres — budget new tyres and quality part worn tyres from Continental, Michelin and Pirelli — because we know that is where most drivers feel the financial pressure most. Our buying power and low overheads mean we can offer prices that no other garage in Reading can match. We will say it straight: you cannot beat our tyre prices anywhere else in Reading.

Beyond tyres, our experienced mechanics handle wheel balancing, wheel alignment, diagnostics, interim and full servicing, brake disc and pad replacement, ball joint replacement, and a wide range of general mechanical repairs. Everything you need under one roof, on your doorstep in central Reading.

When you bring your car to us, you get a straight answer, a fair price, and your vehicle back on the road as fast as possible. No upselling. No vague quotes. No surprises.

Trade & Fleet Partners

Trusted by Reading'sTaxi & Fleet Industry

Our reputation for reliable, fast and affordable tyre and mechanical work has made us the go-to choice for taxi operators, private hire firms and fleet managers across Reading and Berkshire. When vehicles need to be back on the road fast, operators trust Chatham Street Motors to deliver without compromise on quality or price.

We have established partnerships with several of Reading's executive taxi and private hire companies, including Triple A Executive Taxis, providing them with fast turnaround tyre fitting, wheel balancing, brake work and mechanical services at fleet-friendly rates. Our garage is built for efficiency — with multiple ramps, tyre fitting machines and a large stock of tyres always on hand, we minimise downtime for commercial operators.

If you operate a taxi, private hire, or commercial fleet and are looking for a reliable garage partner in Reading, get in touch. We offer priority slots, flexible payment and dedicated account management for fleet customers.

The Chatham StreetDifference

Honest, Transparent Pricing

We quote before we start. The price we tell you is the price you pay. No hidden labour charges, no parts markup surprises. What you see on WhatsApp is what you pay at the garage.

Fast Turnaround

Most tyre fitting jobs are completed while you wait. Servicing and mechanical repairs are typically done same day. We know your time matters — we work efficiently without cutting corners.

Reading's Trusted Local Garage

We are not a corporate chain with a call centre. We are local people serving local drivers. When you message us on WhatsApp, you speak directly to the team — fast, personal, no fuss.

Professional Equipment

We have invested in professional-grade ramps, computerised wheel alignment, tyre fitting machines and diagnostic tools. Your car gets the same quality of care here that you would expect from a main dealer — at a fraction of the price.

New Tyres

Budget New Tyres —Unbeatable Value

Not every driver needs a premium tyre for every mile they cover. Our range of budget new tyres gives you exactly what you need: a safe, legal, reliable tyre that performs well on UK roads without costing a fortune. Every budget tyre we stock meets EU and UK safety and labelling standards and is suited to everyday driving around Reading and beyond.

We cover a comprehensive range of sizes for passenger cars, hatchbacks, SUVs and vans. If we have your size in stock — and we usually do — we can have it fitted, balanced and ready to roll within the hour. Message us on WhatsApp with your tyre size and we will quote you immediately.

All new tyre fittings include balancing, new valve and a full visual inspection of the wheel. No hidden extras.

WhatsApp Abdul WhatsApp Lal
Part Worn Tyres

Premium Brands.Half the Price.

Our part worn tyre selection is where we truly stand out. We source part worn tyres from quality vehicles — cars that have been written off, fleet replacements, and imports with near-new rubber — and inspect every single one before it goes on sale.

We regularly stock part worn tyres from Continental, Michelin and Pirelli. These are the same brands you would pay two, three or four times the price for brand new. Our part worns give you the safety and handling of a premium tyre at a price that makes real financial sense.

Every part worn tyre sold at Chatham Street Motors is checked for minimum legal tread depth, sidewall integrity, bead condition and overall safety before fitting. We do not sell part worns that we would not put on our own cars. That is our standard and we do not compromise on it.

Continental Michelin Pirelli
WhatsApp Abdul WhatsApp Lal
Wheel Services

Balancing &Alignment

Fitting a tyre is only half the job. Proper balancing and alignment protect your investment and keep you safe.

Wheel Balancing

An unbalanced wheel causes vibration through the steering wheel, uneven tyre wear and stress on wheel bearings. Our computerised balancing machine identifies imbalances to within fractions of a gram and applies precise weights to correct them. Every tyre we fit is balanced as standard.

Wheel Alignment

Misaligned wheels cause your car to pull to one side, wear your tyres unevenly and reduce fuel efficiency. Our wheel alignment service uses precision equipment to set your toe, camber and caster angles back to manufacturer specifications. A small investment that saves you significantly on tyre costs over time.

Send us your tyre size — we will quote you in minutes.

WhatsApp Abdul WhatsApp Lal
Mechanical Services

Everything UnderOne Roof

From a quick diagnostic read to a complete service, our mechanics handle it all. Quality parts, honest labour charges, and fast turnaround — every time.

Vehicle Diagnostics

Modern vehicles communicate problems through engine management and warning lights — but interpreting those codes requires professional equipment and experience. Our diagnostic tools connect directly to your vehicle's ECU and retrieve fault codes across all major systems including engine management, ABS, airbags, transmission and more.

We give you a clear, jargon-free explanation of what the code means, whether it is urgent, and what it will cost to fix. No guesswork, no unnecessary repairs. Bring it in or message us first — we will advise you honestly.

Interim Service

Designed for higher mileage drivers or those who want regular peace of mind between full services. An interim service covers the essentials that keep your engine healthy and your car safe.

  • Engine oil and filter change
  • Brake fluid level check
  • Coolant and washer fluid top-up
  • Tyre pressure and condition check
  • Visual safety inspection
  • Battery health check

Full Service

A thorough, top-to-bottom health check and essential component replacement. Ideal for annual maintenance or when purchasing a used vehicle. We inspect and service everything that matters.

  • All interim service items
  • Air filter replacement
  • Cabin pollen filter replacement
  • Full brake system inspection
  • Suspension and steering check
  • All lights and electrical checks
  • Full written report provided

Brake Discs & Brake Pads

Your brakes are the single most important safety system on your vehicle. Worn pads, scored discs or a spongy pedal are not just an MOT advisory — they are a danger to you and everyone else on the road.

We inspect your full braking system and provide a clear recommendation. Pad and disc replacements are carried out with quality parts and our mechanics work fast — most brake jobs are completed same day. We quote before we start and we do not replace what does not need replacing.

Ball Joint Replacement

Ball joints connect your suspension to your steering and are critical to both ride quality and directional control. Worn ball joints produce clunking noises over bumps, vague steering feel and abnormal tyre wear. Left unattended, a failed ball joint can cause a wheel to collapse — an extremely dangerous situation at speed.

Our mechanics diagnose and replace worn ball joints with quality parts, followed by a wheel alignment check to ensure your steering geometry is correct after the repair.

General Mechanical Repairs

Our mechanics cover a broad range of repair work beyond the services listed above. If your car has a problem and you are not sure where to start, bring it in or message us on WhatsApp and we will take a look.

  • Exhaust repair and replacement
  • Wheel bearing replacement
  • Shock absorber replacement
  • CV joint and driveshaft work
  • Engine mounts
  • General investigation and fault finding

Book a service or get a repair quote — message us directly on WhatsApp.
